summary: Backend (pytest 8/8) and frontend E2E tested. All backend endpoints work: categories order, seeded menu items, JWT auth (Bearer), admin CRUD with 401 without token. Frontend home renders hero, category tabs, sections, search filter, empty state, QR modal open/close. Admin login/wrong-password/dashboard/create/edit-testids/delete work.

minor.issue: Seed only runs when menu_items is empty. Currently DB is missing 'Mercimek Çorbası' (çorbalar has 2/3 items). Seed does not restore individual missing items on startup — first-run only.

integration_issues.issue: Delete uses window.confirm(); works for real users. In Playwright, toast 'Silindi' appeared but item persisted in the same test run, likely due to timing between dialog handler registration and click. Verified via API DELETE works correctly. Not a product bug, but consider replacing native confirm with an in-app modal (data-testid='confirm-delete') for better testability.

action_items: Re-seed missing 'Mercimek Çorbası' item (or enhance seed logic to upsert individual missing seed items).
Optional: Replace window.confirm in AdminDashboard.remove() with an in-app confirm dialog with data-testid for reliable e2e testing.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx uses window.confirm — not ideal for automated e2e; consider an in-app modal.
seed_admin_and_menu only seeds when collection empty — silent drift possible; consider idempotent per-slug upsert keyed by (name, category).
Login sets Secure+SameSite=None cookie; frontend uses Bearer via localStorage — cookie flow works but is unused by SPA (fine, but note dual-auth surface).
CORS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True in dev — browsers reject that combo; production must set explicit origins.
seed_data_creation: None persistent. TEST_ items created during tests were cleaned up (backend flow deletes its own; UI-created TEST_UI_Item deleted via API post-run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, JUnit at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml). All frontend testids present (category-tab-*, section-*, search-toggle-btn, search-input, empty-state, qr-share-btn, qr-modal, qr-code, qr-copy-btn, qr-modal-close, login-form, login-email, login-password, login-submit, login-error, new-item-btn, item-form, form-name, form-description, form-price, form-cat-<slug>, form-image, form-save, edit-<id>, delete-<id>, logout-btn). Delete uses window.confirm — register page.on('dialog', accept) BEFORE the click. Note DB missing 'Mercimek Çorbası'.
